ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer targeted by the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the campaign */,
  "pdays" INTEGER /* Number of days passed after the campaign ended */,
  "previous" INTEGER /* Number of contacts performed before this campaign */,
  "emp_var_rate" REAL /* Employment variation rate */,
  "cons_price_idx" REAL /* Consumer price index */,
  "cons_conf_idx" REAL /* Consumer confidence index */,
  "euribor3m" REAL /* Euribor 3 month rate */,
  "nr_employed" REAL /* Number of employees */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign record was last updated */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for whom the prediction was made */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign for which the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_outcome" REAL /* Predicted outcome (probability of taking out a loan) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, in-person visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details about the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feedback */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who responded */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_responses_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
